title: GeckoMan Hybrid Spectrum, Waterproof Switch, 15W Fly Zapper Electric Fly Catcher Bug Zapper Mosquito Killer Flies Killer Trap for Home Indoor UK Plug
bullet_points: Hybrid Spectrum:15W hybrid regular UV and black UV dual bulbs emit a broader light spectrum, which is more effective in attracting a variety of pests, including flies, fruit flies, mosquitoes, gnats, and moths, etc.
Switch-controlled:The waterproof switch allows for easy control without the need to plug and unplug the fly zapper.

Outdoor & Indoor Use:Outside or inside, the IP 23 waterproof rating makes the fly zapper perfect for any setting, whether it's your patio, lawn, backyard, balcony, garden, porch, kitchen, bedroom or warehouse, etc.. Covers up to 1/2 acre outdoors.

Easy to Use:The fly zapper comes with a 5ft long cord to power the 220V/50Hz AC and a removable tray for easy cleaning. Crafted with high quality ABS, the fly zapper's shell provides a secure barrier against accidental contact.

Chemical Free:The fly killer is designed to use wild light spectrum to attract bugs. The fly killer uses a transformer to generate 4200V voltage to charge the inner metal grid, electrocuting the pests when touched. No chemical sprays or foggers are used.
